summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: (u, v) plane with BLUE curve (u(t), v(t)) = (t, 4(1-e^(-t/2))) traced as ValueTracker x_tr sweeps 0→3.5; YELLOW uv rectangle + GREEN ∫u dv region (between curve and v-axis) + RED ∫v du region (between curve and u-axis). Legend + running numeric panel verify ∫u dv + ∫v du = uv.
